# Vendor Directory

External projects live here and should be managed as Git submodules.

Planned submodules:

- `vendor/browser-act-skills` -> `https://github.com/browser-act/skills.git`
- `vendor/rsshub` -> `https://github.com/DIYgod/RSSHub.git`
- `vendor/mediacrawler` -> `https://github.com/NanmiCoder/MediaCrawler.git`

TrendForge treats these projects as optional external tools behind adapters. Do not copy third-party source into the main repository tree.

MediaCrawler remains disabled by default and must only be used after explicit compliance review.
